channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Taiwan says US has not informed it of any pause in planned $14 billion arms sale
Balancing emergency savings and debt repayment: How much to set aside
item.description: Saving for emergencies while paying off debt requires careful planning. Here is how to find the right approach.

item.title: Trump's IRS audit immunity shocks experts, warning it may erode trust in tax system
item.description: Donald Trump is known for reducing his taxes through methods that some experts consider aggressive.

item.title: WATCH: What to watch this Memorial Day weekend
item.description: ABC News' Will Ganss highlights new movies and shows to enjoy over the holiday weekend.
